title: Schoolyard Survey
subtitle: Even the spot you walk past every day
intro: Schools are sampled every day by kids who never look. Be the one who does.
outro: You documented something nobody else has. That's how field science starts.

steps.description: Find something living near the fence or edge of the yard
steps.hint: Edges and fences collect more variety than the middle of any space.

steps.description: Find something living near a door, entrance, or wall
steps.hint: Spiders, ants, weeds, lichens, mosses on bricks -- doorway corners are reliable.

steps.description: Find something at least 50 meters from your other finds today
steps.hint: Push yourself away from the spot everyone photographs. Around the corner, behind the building, the far edge.
